_comment: Baseline for audit-text-html-ratio.mjs. Numbers must only DECREASE — this gate is a ratchet. Bumped on 2026-04-27 to absorb the full-CI build (previous baseline was generated on a partial local build with 31927 scanned files vs CI 120k+). The deploy chain has been blocked by stale baselines that did not include health-premiums, job-market-snapshot, and spa-locale features. Regenerate after lowering offenders by improving a template; never raise the numbers without explicit justification.
